nodes.label: ACM-VIT Student Chapter
nodes.rationale: Official student chapter of ACM at VIT Vellore, pushing boundaries since 2009. Culture built on trust and innovation, turning ideas into real-world impact through research, open-source, and events.

nodes.label: GREP v0 Newsletter
nodes.rationale: ACM-VIT's official quarterly newsletter, Origins Edition. Curated snapshot of the chapter's journey spotlighting initiatives, impactful work, and people. The 0th edition revisits ACM-VIT's 15-year journey to provide context and continuity.

nodes.label: Association for Computing Machinery (ACM)
nodes.rationale: World's largest educational and scientific organization in computing, established 1947. Amplifies collective voice of computing profession through visionary leadership, advocacy for high standards, and recognition of technical achievements.

nodes.label: ACM-VIT Student Chapter
nodes.rationale: Official student chapter of ACM at VIT Vellore, founded 2009 (officially launched Jan 25, 2010). Student-led, technology-driven community making technology accessible and fostering innovation. Over 150 members. Tagline: 'Because Technology Matters'. Motto: 'Give people wonderful tools, and they'll do wonderful things.'

nodes.label: ACM-W (ACM Women)
nodes.rationale: Association for Computing Machinery - Women chapter. Mission to encourage and empower women in STEM through community, mentorship, and knowledge sharing. Won best emerging chapter award at ACM-India Summit 2023.

nodes.label: Code2Create Hackathon
nodes.rationale: Flagship 36-hour hackathon debuted September 2015. Interdisciplinary teams work on theme-based tracks (Fintech, AR/VR, Clean Energy, Health Care, Education, Smart Cities, Space). Grew from local to pan-India with close to 1000 registrations. Code2Create 2025 was the latest edition.

nodes.label: Reverse Coding
nodes.rationale: Competitive coding event where participants reverse-engineer the logic from expected output and write source from scratch. Started April 2013 with 96 participants, grew to 900. Biggest competitive coding event at VIT.

nodes.label: Cryptic Hunt
nodes.rationale: Tech-based scavenger hunt solving cryptic riddles via QR codes. Introduced as lead Gravitas event September 2022. Grew to graVITas' biggest scavenger hunt with 800+ participants annually.

nodes.label: Codart
nodes.rationale: Competitive programming event combined with dart throwing. Started 2016 with 120 participants, grew to 200+ teams by 2018. Online rounds followed by offline finale where dart throws decided coding challenge difficulty.

nodes.label: Code++
nodes.rationale: Pure competitive programming event. 4-hour mathematical marathon on HackerRank, 800 participants. Focuses on complex algorithms and mathematical puzzles.

nodes.label: The Tiny Hack
nodes.rationale: 10-hour hackathon held 2023 for building small impactful solutions to real-world problems.

nodes.label: Apptitude
nodes.rationale: 36-hour hackathon dedicated to app development, first organized July 2020. Gives app dev its own spotlight. Apptitude'21 was SDG-themed.

nodes.label: Forktober
nodes.rationale: Open-source initiative inspired by Hacktoberfest (DigitalOcean), first hosted October 2021. Beginner-friendly repositories across App Dev, Web Dev, and ML to promote open source at VIT.

nodes.label: Codex Cryptum
nodes.rationale: Specialized cybersecurity and cryptography workshop, first edition September 2022. Hands-on sessions with industry specialists on advanced security topics.

nodes.label: The Neural Hack
nodes.rationale: AI-based hackathon powered by ACM-W community, launched December 2020. Welcomes beginners and skilled developers to experiment with advanced AI models.

nodes.label: InspiHER Speaker Series
nodes.rationale: Speaker series by ACM-W featuring accomplished women from science and engineering, sparking meaningful conversations on career growth.

nodes.label: ACM Summer Bootcamp
nodes.rationale: Multi-day program (July 2021) covering Web Dev (HTML/CSS/JS), Mobile App Engineering (Flutter), Machine Learning (Python gesture recognition), and Design Innovation. Guided 400 learners.

nodes.label: ExamCooker
nodes.rationale: Exam preparation platform aggregating notes, past papers, and Q&A forum for VIT students. Built with Next.js, CockroachDB, and Prisma. 12,000+ users.

nodes.label: CLI-RPG
nodes.rationale: Text-based command-line adventure game with branching narrative, ASCII art, dynamic music, and multiple endings. Built with Rust, Ratatui, and Supabase.

nodes.label: UniPool
nodes.rationale: Carpooling platform for VIT students with real-time updates, smart route matching, and easy coordination.

nodes.label: ACMOne
nodes.rationale: Internal coordination platform for 100+ organizing committee members. Event planning, deadline tracking, ID scanning, team communication, calendar, and collaboration tools.

nodes.label: OS Selections Portal
nodes.rationale: 2025 organizing committee selections portal with macOS-inspired interface, interactive desktop experience, mini-games (ACM Draws, Doom, 2048). Dual-purpose: recruitment tool and digital showcase.

nodes.label: Localhost Selections Portal
nodes.rationale: 2024 organizing committee selections portal with VS Code-inspired interface. Streamlines recruitment from application to candidate evaluation.

nodes.label: Self-Adapting Language Models (SEAL)
nodes.rationale: AI paper showing model self-improvement by creating own training edits and updating weights directly, trained with reinforcement learning. Featured in LocalHost Finds section.

nodes.label: Wilson Lin Search Engine
nodes.author: Wilson Lin
nodes.rationale: Building a neural search engine from scratch in two months. Scales to 3B embeddings on ~200 GPUs, indexes ~280M pages, serves results in ~500ms. Featured in LocalHost Finds.

nodes.label: Vercel Cloudinary DNS Legacy
nodes.rationale: Subtle tech find: assets.vercel.com still points to Cloudinary despite Vercel having Blob for first-party storage - a trace of Vercel's past DNS that was never cleaned up. Featured in LocalHost Finds.

nodes.label: LocalHost Finds
nodes.rationale: ACM-VIT's hub for rare tech finds and sharp discussions. Curates exciting discoveries from the tech world.
